title: Matadu Matadu Mallige
desc: A driven yet speech-impaired Swaragini regains her self-assurance when Sandeep arrives, acting as a beacon of hope and reigniting her determination.

title: Matadu Matadu Mallige
desc: A driven yet speech-impaired Swaragini regains her self-assurance when Sandeep arrives, acting as a beacon of hope and reigniting her determination.

title: Preethigagi
desc: Chandrakala's idyllic village life crumbles after her NRI husband's betrayal and family rejection. Heartbroken and alone, she must discover her strength and redefine her future.

title: Preethigagi
desc: Chandrakala, a beautiful young woman, is betrayed by her NRI husband, leaving her distraught. However, things become complicated when even her family rejects her, forcing her to build her life alone.

title: Vasudeva Kutumba
desc: Swati and Vamshi discuss the residence before Saroja reflects on her past actions.

title: Jai Lalitha
desc: Lalitha accepts Parameshwari's pooja challenge under Guruji's direction. Later, she shows great courage, persisting and moving ahead even when faced with significant obstacles.

title: Suvarna Gruha Manthri
desc: The host engages with families who compete against each other in a variety of entertaining games and thereby win exciting gift hampers.

title: Gauri Shankara
desc: Shankara meets Gowri, a principled young woman, and falls deeply in love with her. As their relationship blossoms, their love is tested by trials and tribulations.

title: Nee Iralu Jotheyalli
desc: Rachana and Krishna are complete opposites, yet fate brings them close. As Urmila's anger rises, they must fight to stay together through the storm.

title: Sharade
desc: Sharade goes with her daughter to live with her husband but learns that he is with another woman. When her husband abandons her, she decides to stay in the city and raise her child.

title: Aase
desc: The lives of two ordinary people, Surya and Meena, collide. While the former is aimless with no hope in life, the latter smiles through adversities and makes sacrifices for her family's happiness.

title: Ninna Jothe Nanna Kathe
desc: In a tense hospital visit, Shravan rushes Purshottam, who passes out from Devayani's fear. Meanwhile, Anjana and Sangeetha seek answers from Devayani about the situation.

title: Vasudeva Kutumba
desc: The familiar routines of Swati and her family crumble when her father passes away. Amid financial issues, betrayal and hurdles of responsibility, Swati must rebuild the family.

title: Udho Udho Shri Renuka Yellamma
desc: Renuka, the daughter of a royal family, and Yellamma, the daughter of a village family, are both reincarnations of Goddess Parvati, determined to protect the world from evil.

title: Jai Lalitha
desc: With her quick wit and visionary approach, Lalitha becomes the village head. However, the real challenge arises when she is confronted with family politics.

title: Snehada Kadalalli
desc: Shivaraj's life takes an unexpected turn when he becomes the guardian of his estranged stepsisters. Despite facing challenges and reluctance, he continues to forge a path towards reconciliation.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
desc: Meenakshi's noble aspirations to aid the poor irk her potential in-laws. Despite Leela's attempts to smooth things over, the offended family brushes off her pleas.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
desc: En route to the airport, Aadhya attempts a daring escape by leaping from the moving car but Megha seizes her. Subsequently, Anupamaa arrives on the scene, intervening to rescue Aadhya.

title: Ninna Jothe Nanna Kathe
desc: After Bhoomi and Ajith tie the knot out of convenience, they strive to build a bond and draw strength from each other in tough situations.

desc: Radha and Krishna fall in love with each other and face various obstacles along their way that ultimately deepen their friendship and affection.

title: Radha Krishna
desc: Radha's unwavering devotion to Krishna is tested as their love story evolves, with Krishna guiding her through life's challenges while revealing the deeper meanings of love, duty and spirituality.

title: Suvarna Suprabhatha
desc: A religious scholar sheds light on the spiritual significance of temples and shares insights on how various rituals play an important role in Hinduism.

title: Suvarna Sankalp
desc: An astrologer presents the day's horoscope and provides insights into how to live a healthy life and grow close to God through devotion.

title: Bombat Bhojana
desc: Chandru welcomes Divya, a viewer, and prepares a special summer dish of 'Appe Huli'. Later, Chandru receives a special surprise on Father's Day.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
desc: Anupama suffers a grievous stab wound while trying to defend Aadhya from Megha's violent threats. Later, the family is horrified to learn about Anupama's critical health.

title: Anupama-Sarvagunaa Sampanne
desc: Grief engulfs the Shah household after the doctors break the news of Anupamaa's demise. On the other hand, Anuj struggles to come to terms with the shocking news.
